releaseNotes: Toast notification system (top-right overlay, slide+fade animation)
Sidebar: badge counts on nav items, responsive auto-collapse below 900px
Inventory: row hover highlight, tabbed detail popup (Details/Expiry/History), empty state with icon + add button
Dashboard: empty state for recent materials, pie chart now interactive (tap to enlarge slice)
Reports: bar chart uses distinct colors, pie chart tap interaction
LoginView: dark mode support (no more hardcoded white card)
Skeleton shimmer: unified gradient across all pages
Toast: fixed rendering above dialog overlays
